blocks.content: In this milestone, you verify that your instrumentation is working and telemetry data is flowing to Grafana Cloud. This confirms that your service is being monitored and you can start gaining insights from the collected data.
On the **Manage** tab in Instrumentation Hub, confirm your service shows status **Instrumented**. If it still shows **Instrumenting**, wait another minute and refresh.
Find your service in the Service Catalog. You may need to wait 1-2 minutes for it to populate.
Click your service to see RED metrics: request rate, error rate, and duration percentiles.
Optionally, go to **Explore**, select your Traces data source, and filter by your service name to see spans.

| Location | Expected result |
|----------|------------------|
| Instrumentation Hub > Manage | Status: **Instrumented** |
| Application Observability | Service appears with RED metrics |
| Explore (Traces) | Spans visible for your service (if enabled) |

Data is successfully flowing from your instrumented service to Grafana Cloud.

In the next milestone, you'll celebrate your achievement and explore next steps.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Application Observability](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/application-observability/)
- [Explore traces in Grafana](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/explore/simplified-exploration/traces/)
- [Introduction to the knowledge graph](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/introduction/)

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following topics if you need help:

- [Manage instrumentation and settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#manage-instrumentation-and-settings)
- [Troubleshoot Kubernetes Monitoring](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/kubernetes-monitoring/configuration/troubleshooting/)
- [Troubleshoot Service Graph and RED metrics](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/traces/troubleshoot/#troubleshoot-service-graph-and-red-metrics)
